item.name: Bennu Horn
item.description: This horn of bone emits a golden tone that summons a mythical bennu.

mount.name: Bennu
mount.action: Summon forth the mythical bennu. Very few have had the privilege of viewing this bird up close.
mount.description: This bird was reborn after drinking deep of the aether that flowed forth from the immortal Phoenix, who appeared in the skies of Carteneau during the Calamity. Named after a legendary bird, bennu means “a shining object, rising in brilliance.”
mount.tooltip:
'Twixt this world and the next
do the aetherial currents swirl,
bearing the very essence of life.
- Urianger
